productDisplayName: Nike Women's Striped Polo Orange T-shirt
description: CompositionWhite and orange striped t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed and tipped collar, buttoned chest placket, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline, short sleeves with ribbed hem, embroidery on left chest and vented hemFittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron inside out, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean Up your sporting ante by slipping into the nike sportswear range, and enjoy the pleasure of sporting in style. This t-shirt from nike is made of pure cotton, ensuring a fresh and comfort Fit. Team this with Nike performance shorts or pants and training shoes, or with jeans and floaters on a casual day for unparalleled cool.
